title: YBM RC1000-2 — Test 05 (Reading)
desc: Đề 5/10 trong sách YBM 실전토익 RC1000 vol.2 — Part 5–7, câu 101–200. Đáp án theo key đề gốc.

parts.directions: Chọn từ/cụm từ đúng nhất để hoàn thành câu.

items.question: The new beverage from the Elmhurst Corporation can be described _____ a nutritional energy drink.
items.explanation: Cụm cố định 'be described as' (được mô tả/coi là). Sau 'described' dùng giới từ 'as' để giới thiệu danh tính/vai trò.

items.question: The upfront investment in the manufacturing sector will _____ result in the creation of hundreds of jobs.
items.explanation: Cần trạng từ chỉ kết quả cuối cùng: 'ultimately' (cuối cùng thì) hợp nghĩa 'khoản đầu tư... cuối cùng sẽ tạo ra hàng trăm việc làm'. 'commonly/constantly/formerly' đều sai nghĩa.

items.question: The office manager hoped to _____ the changes to the dress code policy at the meeting.
items.explanation: Sau 'hoped to' phải dùng động từ nguyên mẫu (to + V-bare), nên chọn 'clarify'.

items.question: The noise from the construction equipment outside of Mr. Polanco's office made it difficult to _____.
items.explanation: 'made it difficult to _____' cần động từ hợp nghĩa: tiếng ồn khiến khó 'concentrate' (tập trung). Các lựa chọn khác không hợp ngữ cảnh.

items.question: Due to the very competitive nature of the field, the managers are seeking new and unique _____ to reaching customers.
items.explanation: Sau hai tính từ 'new and unique' cần danh từ. 'approaches to reaching customers' (những cách tiếp cận khách hàng) — danh từ số nhiều đúng.

items.question: After receiving _____ complaints about the device overheating, Wayvon Electronics recalled its new smartphone.
items.explanation: Cần tính từ bổ nghĩa cho 'complaints': 'numerous complaints' (vô số lời than phiền). 'number' là danh từ, 'numerate/numerated' sai nghĩa.

items.question: The originality of Ms. Lanham's entry could not be denied, _____ she did not make it to the final round of the art competition.
items.explanation: Hai vế tương phản: tính độc đáo không thể phủ nhận, NHƯNG cô ấy không vào chung kết. Liên từ chỉ tương phản 'yet' (tuy nhiên) đúng.

items.question: Staff members at this company are expected to give as much notice as possible whenever _____ need time off work for a vacation.
items.explanation: Chỗ trống là chủ ngữ của mệnh đề 'whenever _____ need time off', nên cần đại từ chủ ngữ 'we'. 'our/ours/ourselves' không làm chủ ngữ.

items.question: After reviewing the two submitted bids, council members selected the more _____ option because of the company's reputation for reliability.
items.explanation: Đã có 'more' phía trước nên cần tính từ nguyên cấp: 'the more costly option'. 'costlier' đã là so sánh hơn (không dùng với 'more').

items.question: The physician explained that a feeling of dizziness _____ accompanies increased thirst when a patient has not drunk enough water.
items.explanation: Cần trạng từ tần suất bổ nghĩa động từ 'accompanies': 'often accompanies' (thường đi kèm). 'either/much/next' không hợp.

items.question: The emphasis placed _____ teamwork helps Espinoza International's employees feel supported.
items.explanation: Cụm cố định 'emphasis (placed) on' (sự chú trọng vào). Danh từ 'emphasis' đi với giới từ 'on'.

items.question: For safety reasons, all employees and customers must _____ the building when the fire alarm sounds.
items.explanation: Khi chuông báo cháy kêu thì phải 'vacate the building' (rời khỏi/sơ tán khỏi tòa nhà). 'decline/dispose/suspend' sai nghĩa.

items.question: Those who are familiar with the jazz trio's first album may find its latest release to be _____ similar.
items.explanation: Cần trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho tính từ 'similar': 'recognizably similar' (giống nhau một cách dễ nhận thấy).

items.question: Analysts predict that Bolman Automotive will have a _____ for its hybrid vehicles for at least the next few years.
items.explanation: Sau mạo từ 'a' cần danh từ số ít: 'have a demand for' (có nhu cầu về). 'demands' số nhiều không đi với 'a'.

items.question: Ms. Jang was offered a promotion after handling the emergency procedures during the power outage _____.
items.explanation: Cần trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho động từ 'handling': xử lý quy trình khẩn cấp một cách 'admirably' (đáng khâm phục). Vị trí cuối câu bổ nghĩa cho hành động.

items.question: The annual community softball tournament welcomes teams of all ages and _____ abilities.
items.explanation: Cần tính từ bổ nghĩa cho danh từ 'abilities'. 'athletic abilities' (khả năng thể thao) là cụm tính từ + danh từ. B/D là danh từ, C là trạng từ đều không hợp.

items.question: Owing to the package's _____ contents, the courier was instructed not to stack anything heavy on top of it.
items.explanation: 'fragile contents' (đồ dễ vỡ) giải thích lý do được dặn không chồng đồ nặng lên trên. Các từ 'sudden/vivid/shallow' (đột ngột/sống động/nông cạn) không hợp ngữ cảnh.

items.question: Once the sales personnel were informed that the product launch exceeded projections, they realized they had been _____ worried.
items.explanation: Vì doanh số vượt dự kiến nên họ nhận ra đã lo lắng 'needlessly' (một cách không cần thiết). Trạng từ này khớp logic 'lo hão'.

items.question: All massage therapists working at the Sunset Spa are required to have valid state _____ as well as three years of experience.
items.explanation: Sau 'valid state' cần danh từ làm tân ngữ của 'have': 'certification' (chứng chỉ). A là động từ, B/C là tính từ/phân từ.

items.question: Surprisingly, Mr. Saraf can _____ arrive faster by train because traveling by air requires a long security procedure.
items.explanation: Cần trạng từ đứng trước động từ 'arrive': 'can still arrive faster' (vẫn có thể đến nhanh hơn). 'whether/both/despite' không phù hợp vị trí và ngữ pháp.

items.question: The jet ski is unlikely to flip over when in operation, but users must nonetheless take the necessary _____.
items.explanation: Cụm cố định 'take the necessary precautions' (thực hiện các biện pháp phòng ngừa cần thiết). Các danh từ còn lại không đi với 'take necessary' theo nghĩa an toàn.

items.question: Most tenants agree that the landlord made the right decision _____ the addition of motion-sensor lights near the side entrances.
items.explanation: Cần giới từ nghĩa 'về việc': 'the decision regarding the addition...' (quyết định liên quan đến việc lắp thêm...). 'since/into/underneath' sai nghĩa.

items.question: The creators of the product claim that if you spray it evenly on carpeting or curtains, any odor _____ within a few minutes.
items.explanation: Chủ ngữ 'any odor' là đối tượng bị loại bỏ nên cần thể bị động tương lai: 'will be eliminated' (sẽ được khử). C là chủ động sai nghĩa; A/B là 'to V' không làm động từ chính của mệnh đề.

items.question: PG Internet was able to expand its network exponentially thanks to a number of important _____ in technology.
items.explanation: 'advancements in technology' (những tiến bộ về công nghệ) hợp với việc mở rộng mạng lưới. 'promotions/elevations/enlargements' không phải cách diễn đạt 'tiến bộ công nghệ'.

items.question: Local art enthusiasts were delighted at the news that the museum procured a rare painting _____ to be worth over two million euros.
items.explanation: Mệnh đề đã có động từ chính 'procured', nên chỗ trống là phân từ quá khứ rút gọn bổ nghĩa 'painting': 'a painting estimated to be worth...' (= which was estimated). C là động từ chia thì sẽ thừa động từ.

items.question: Officials are taking extraordinary measures to prevent some people from putting more _____ currency into circulation.
items.explanation: 'counterfeit currency' (tiền giả) là thứ mà giới chức muốn ngăn đưa vào lưu thông. 'biased/negligent/reckless' (thiên vị/cẩu thả/liều lĩnh) không mô tả tiền tệ.

items.question: Consumers were encouraged to return all battery packs to the manufacturer during its recall, however _____ they may be.
items.explanation: Cấu trúc nhượng bộ 'however + tính từ + S + may be' (dù có... đến đâu). Cần tính từ 'operational' (còn hoạt động) sau 'however'. B là danh từ, C trạng từ, D động từ đều sai.

items.question: The general consensus is that too much television near bedtime is bad for one's health, but Dr. Iversen set out to prove _____.
items.explanation: 'prove otherwise' (chứng minh điều ngược lại) đối lập với quan điểm chung vừa nêu. 'instead/opposite/else' không tạo cụm 'prove ___' đúng nghĩa này.

items.question: Because she enjoys learning about other cultures, Ms. Fernandez prefers to take vacations overseas _____ stay closer to home.
items.explanation: 'prefers to take vacations overseas rather than stay closer to home' — cấu trúc so sánh lựa chọn 'rather than' (thay vì). 'in order that/as if/whereas' sai cấu trúc và nghĩa.

items.question: Thanks to their beautiful illustrations and charming storylines, Alice Boyd's children's books have been _____ popular.
items.explanation: Nhờ tranh minh họa đẹp và cốt truyện cuốn hút nên sách 'enduringly popular' (nổi tiếng bền lâu). 'willingly/hastily/scarcely' (sẵn lòng/vội vàng/hầu như không) không hợp nghĩa.

parts.directions: Đọc đoạn văn có 4 chỗ trống, chọn phương án phù hợp nhất cho mỗi chỗ trống.

items.title: TO ALL CHESTER'S STEAKHOUSE CUSTOMERS
items.text: Chester's Steakhouse [131] to bringing you the best dining experience, so it's welcome news that our patio is finally open for the summer. While dining in the fresh air, please keep in mind that sections of this neighborhood are zoned as residential. Therefore, you should be [132] by monitoring your voice volume in the late evening, especially when walking past the apartments opposite our main entrance. Thank you in advance for your cooperation; it will help us to maintain a positive [133] with those living nearby. Should you prefer to move indoors at any time, we can easily accommodate you. [134]

questions.explanation: Câu thiếu động từ chính; cụm 'be committed to + V-ing' (cam kết làm gì) → 'is committed to bringing'. Chọn động từ chia thì hiện tại 'is committed'.
Sau động từ 'be' (you should be [132]) cần tính từ làm bổ ngữ: 'be courteous' (lịch sự). 'courteously' là trạng từ, 'courteousness/courtesy' là danh từ.
'maintain a positive relationship with those living nearby' — duy trì mối quan hệ tốt với hàng xóm. Chỉ 'relationship' đi với 'positive... with' và hợp ngữ cảnh giữ thiện cảm với người xung quanh.

choices.A: Just inform your server that you wish to do so.
choices.B: We appreciate your bringing this problem to our attention.
choices.C: As a result, the opening of the patio will be delayed.
choices.D: It may take longer to prepare the dish than usual.

questions.explanation: Câu trước: 'Should you prefer to move indoors... we can easily accommodate you.' Câu điền tiếp nối bằng hướng dẫn cách thực hiện: 'Just inform your server that you wish to do so' (do so = move indoors).

items.text:
To: Armando Michaud <armando@michauddrycleaning.com>
From: Ashville Bank <loans@ashvillebank.com>
Date: January 18
Subject: Small Business Loan

Dear Mr. Michaud,

Thank you for your interest in a small business loan from Ashville Bank. Please fill out the attached [135], which afford us information about your business model as well as your personal credit history. It is essential that you [136] accurate information on the form. Failure to do so could result in the delay or [137] the rejection of your application. While we do our best to accommodate all requests, we may not be able to issue you the full amount. [138]

Sincerely,

The Ashville Bank Loans Team

questions.explanation: Mệnh đề quan hệ dùng động từ số nhiều 'which afford us information' → chủ ngữ phải số nhiều: 'the attached forms'. Chọn danh từ số nhiều 'forms'.
Cấu trúc giả định sau 'It is essential that + S + V(nguyên mẫu)': 'that you provide accurate information'. Dùng động từ nguyên mẫu 'provide'.
'the delay or even the rejection' — 'even' nhấn mạnh mức độ nặng hơn (chậm trễ, hoặc thậm chí bị từ chối). 'more/rather/yet' không hợp cấu trúc 'A or ___ B' nhấn mạnh này.

choices.A: For this reason, our bank has received high customer service ratings.
choices.B: Nevertheless, we took your personal circumstances into consideration.
choices.C: In that case, there may still be other options available to you.
choices.D: Alternatively, you can check your balance to confirm that it was received.

questions.explanation: Câu trước: 'we may not be able to issue you the full amount.' Câu điền tiếp nối hợp lý: 'In that case, there may still be other options available to you' (trong trường hợp đó, vẫn còn lựa chọn khác).

items.title: Norcross Sleep Center
items.text:
Norcross Sleep Center
1200 Hanifan Lane • 461-555-0138

It is estimated that up to twenty percent of people suffer from a sleep problem. Many sleep issues may not be [139] to the affected person, so we recommend testing yourself even if you do not have severe symptoms. To have your condition assessed, visit our center in person, where our technicians can [140] a wide variety of sleep disorders. On the other hand, you may [141] test your sleep at home by renting a monitor. We will analyze the data after one week. A prescription is required for some of our devices, such as our continuous positive airway pressure (CPAP) machines. [142]

questions.explanation: 'Many sleep issues may not be apparent to the affected person' — nhiều vấn đề giấc ngủ có thể không rõ ràng/dễ nhận thấy với người mắc, nên khuyên tự kiểm tra dù không có triệu chứng nặng. 'apparent' = rõ ràng, hiển nhiên.
'our technicians can diagnose a wide variety of sleep disorders' — kỹ thuật viên chẩn đoán nhiều loại rối loạn giấc ngủ. 'diagnose' hợp với 'disorders'; 'interpret/conduct/inherit' không phù hợp.
'you may comfortably test your sleep at home' — bạn có thể kiểm tra giấc ngủ một cách thoải mái tại nhà (đối lập với đến trung tâm). Trạng từ 'comfortably' hợp ngữ cảnh; các trạng từ khác vô lý.

choices.A: Each week, you will receive an updated report.
choices.B: Most reported success after a few weeks.
choices.C: Please take care of this as soon as possible.
choices.D: Others are available to general consumers.

questions.explanation: Câu trước: 'A prescription is required for some of our devices...' (một số thiết bị cần đơn thuốc). Câu điền tương phản 'some... others': 'Others are available to general consumers' (số khác thì bán cho người tiêu dùng thường).

items.text: October 6—Nicole Walt has accepted the role of National Transportation Advisor, replacing Leon Hixon, who is stepping down to start his own consulting business. Ms. Walt is [143] respected for her impressive security expertise. She [144] transportation in the southeast region of the country for several years, and supporters believe she will easily adapt to her larger-scale role. Analysts predict that she will soon push parliament to sell a section of the rail line to a corporation. A sale such as this would generate immediate profit for the national transportation system. [145] However, Walt will face strong opponents of the [146] of the system, as many believe publicly used services should stay in public hands.

questions.explanation: Bổ nghĩa cho phân từ/tính từ 'respected' cần trạng từ: 'is highly respected' (được kính trọng rất mực). 'high' là tính từ/trạng từ chỉ vị trí, 'height' là danh từ.
'for several years' chỉ hành động kéo dài từ quá khứ đến hiện tại → hiện tại hoàn thành tiếp diễn 'has been managing'. Câu ở thể chủ động (quản lý giao thông) nên loại 'was managed'.

choices.A: It is also expected to result in more reliable journey times.
choices.B: Fortunately, this is considered to be an unlikely scenario.
choices.C: For instance, she plans to focus on modernizing ticket processing.
choices.D: Each one would benefit the thousands of daily passengers.

questions.explanation: Câu trước nói vụ bán sẽ 'generate immediate profit'. Câu điền thêm lợi ích thứ hai bằng 'also': 'It is also expected to result in more reliable journey times' ('It' = vụ bán). Câu sau 'However...' chuyển sang phản đối, khớp mạch.

Ngữ cảnh: bán một phần đường sắt cho một tập đoàn = tư nhân hóa. 'opponents of the privatization of the system, as many believe publicly used services should stay in public hands' — 'privatization' đối lập với 'stay in public hands'.

parts.directions: Đọc đoạn văn và trả lời các câu hỏi.

items.title: Lightness and Darkness
items.text:
Regent Museum cordially invites you to the pre-opening of

Lightness and Darkness
An exhibit of paintings by Leslie Diaz

Friday, January 20, 7 P.M.

The Regent Museum is pleased to have these amazing paintings on display. Ms. Diaz's latest exhibition is inspired by her travels through Southeast Asia, where she observed the remarkable seaside and mountain landscapes that are central to her paintings. Your membership entitles you to attend this event and see the artwork ahead of the press and the general public.

questions.question: What is indicated about Ms. Diaz?

choices.A: She is making her debut at the Regent Museum.
choices.B: Her paintings will be sold by auction.
choices.C: She used to live in Southeast Asia.
choices.D: Her artwork depicts scenes from nature.

questions.explanation: Bài viết bà Diaz vẽ phong cảnh thiên nhiên: "she observed the remarkable seaside and mountain landscapes that are central to her paintings" — biển và núi là cảnh thiên nhiên, nên tranh mô tả cảnh vật tự nhiên.

questions.question: Who most likely is the recipient of the invitation?
questions.explanation: Thư mời gửi cho hội viên bảo trợ bảo tàng: "Your membership entitles you to attend this event and see the artwork ahead of the press and the general public." — có tư cách hội viên nên người nhận là người ủng hộ bảo tàng.

items.title: Your account has been updated.
items.text:
https://www.piedlantclothing.com/account

Your account has been updated.

Name: Diana Peters
E-mail Address: dpeters@kemberyco.com

You have successfully unsubscribed from the Piedlant Clothing free monthly newsletter. You will still receive e-mails from Piedlant Clothing about the status of the orders you place and any policy changes that affect our Terms of Use for online customers. If you would like to undo this action, please click here. Please take a moment to let us know why you no longer wish to receive the newsletter.

Comments: I have been a regular customer of Piedlant Clothing for years, but the recent increase in prices has changed the way I plan to interact with the brand. While I'll still consider Piedlant Clothing for apparel for special occasions, it's more practical for me to purchase my casual clothing elsewhere.

questions.question: Why did Ms. Peters visit the Web page?

choices.A: To leave a review of an order
choices.C: To remove herself from a mailing list
choices.D: To contribute ideas to a newsletter

questions.explanation: Bà Peters vào trang để hủy đăng ký nhận bản tin (rời danh sách gửi thư): "You have successfully unsubscribed from the Piedlant Clothing free monthly newsletter."

questions.question: What does Ms. Peters mention about Piedlant Clothing?

choices.A: It does not sell casual clothing anymore.
choices.C: It sends e-mails to customers too frequently.
choices.D: Its merchandise has become less affordable.

questions.explanation: Bà Peters nói giá tăng khiến hàng kém phải chăng hơn: "the recent increase in prices has changed the way I plan to interact with the brand" — tăng giá = ít dễ mua/kém affordable.

items.text:
Charles Lowenthal [4:25 P.M.]
Stephanie, do you know what time you're coming back to the office?

Stephanie Martin [4:26 P.M.]
Actually, I wasn't planning to do so. I'll be in the meeting with Caudill Enterprises until about 6 P.M., so I'd like to go straight home. Why do you ask?

Charles Lowenthal [4:28 P.M.]
The carpets will be cleaned this evening, so employees are supposed to remove all of their personal items from the floor of their cubicles.

Stephanie Martin [4:29 P.M.]
Oh, no! I had forgotten about that! Would it be too inconvenient for you to do it for me?

Charles Lowenthal [4:30 P.M.]
Not at all.

Stephanie Martin [4:31 P.M.]
Thank you! I owe you one.

questions.question: What does Mr. Lowenthal ask Ms. Martin?
questions.explanation: Ông Lowenthal hỏi khi nào cô Martin quay lại: "Stephanie, do you know what time you're coming back to the office?"

questions.question: At 4:30 P.M., what does Mr. Lowenthal most likely mean when he writes, "Not at all"?

choices.A: He will clear Ms. Martin's work space.
choices.B: He has run out of some supplies.
choices.C: He was unable to speak with some clients.
choices.D: He will amend a cleaning schedule.

questions.explanation: Cô Martin nhờ dọn đồ cá nhân giúp ("Would it be too inconvenient for you to do it for me?" — dọn personal items khỏi cubicle vì sắp giặt thảm), ông đáp "Not at all" nghĩa là đồng ý dọn chỗ làm việc giúp cô.

items.text:
To: All Roane Incorporated Employees
From: Rahul Shevade, Human Resources Director
Date: October 6
Re: 25 years in business

Dear Staff Members,

At the end of next month, Roane Incorporated will be celebrating its twenty-fifth anniversary. We want to hold a party to commemorate this achievement. I am currently looking for six people to join our planning board so that we can make the preparations for the event. Please note that this opportunity is open to staff members in every department. If you are interested, please e-mail me no later than Wednesday, October 15, with notes about when you would be able to take part in group meetings. After the deadline, I will review everyone's availability and select a time and day that works for all of us. Thank you for your consideration.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the memo?

choices.A: To invite employees to a celebration
choices.D: To congratulate the staff on an achievement

questions.explanation: Mục đích memo là tìm thành viên ban tổ chức (ủy ban): "I am currently looking for six people to join our planning board so that we can make the preparations for the event."

questions.question: What does Mr. Shevade indicate will be determined after October 15?
questions.explanation: Sau hạn 15/10, ông Shevade sẽ chọn thời gian họp: "After the deadline, I will review everyone's availability and select a time and day that works for all of us."

items.title: McDorwell Supplies
items.text:
McDorwell Supplies
www.mcdorwellsupplies.com ▽ 1-800-555-0100

Business Name: Atchley's                Point of Contact: Michael Atchley
Phone Number: 901-555-0127              Date of Order: July 9
Billing Address: 875 Myrtle Avenue, Memphis, TN 38018
Shipping Address: 1299 Baldwin Street, Memphis, TN 38018
Shipping Type: Overnight Express        Return Cutoff Date: July 16
McDorwell Supplies Loyalty Program Number: 5498-7319

Item Description | Quantity | Price Per Unit | Total
18-inch wire hangers (pack of 500) | 5 | $21.99 | $109.95
Cardboard shoulder guards (pack of 500) | 3 | $28.49 | $85.47
Liquid stain remover (5L) | 4 | $29.99 | $119.96
All-in-one detergent (20L) | 3 | $189.99 | $569.97

Thank you for your purchase. To help us better serve you, please take a moment to complete a brief customer service questionnaire at www.mcdorwellsupplies.com/survey. Your feedback is important to us.

Subtotal: $885.35
Taxes and Delivery: $83.75
Total Due: $969.10

questions.question: What kind of business most likely is Atchley's?
questions.explanation: Các mặt hàng đặt gợi ý dịch vụ giặt là: "wire hangers", "Cardboard shoulder guards", "Liquid stain remover", "All-in-one detergent" — móc treo, chống nhăn vai, tẩy vết bẩn, bột giặt là đồ nghề tiệm giặt khô.

questions.question: When will Mr. Atchley's delivery most likely arrive?
questions.explanation: Ngày đặt là 9/7 và giao Overnight Express (chuyển phát qua đêm) nên hàng đến hôm sau, 10/7: "Date of Order: July 9" + "Shipping Type: Overnight Express".

questions.question: What is implied in the invoice?

choices.B: Mr. Atchley has completed a survey.
choices.C: A shipping fee has been decreased.
choices.D: The order will be sent to two addresses.

questions.explanation: Hóa đơn ngụ ý Atchley's đang tích điểm khách hàng thân thiết vì có số thẻ: "McDorwell Supplies Loyalty Program Number: 5498-7319".

items.title: NOTICE TO REIMELT GYM MEMBERS
items.text:
NOTICE TO REIMELT GYM MEMBERS

Reimelt Gym members who use our on-site parking lot should make alternative arrangements from September 1 to 7, as the lot will be off limits in order to accommodate work crews who will be repaving sections of the lot and sealing minor cracks. During this time, the main entrance will remain locked, and all members will need to use the employee entrance at the west end of the building. Updates regarding progress on the parking lot will be posted on our Web site. The schedule of fitness classes that we offer throughout the week will not be affected.

A private parking lot is located near the gym on Radcliffe Avenue. Unfortunately, we are unable to reimburse you for any costs incurred. We apologize for any inconvenience this work may cause, and we appreciate your patience. Also, this is one of many projects we intend to carry out over the next six months. We are always willing to hear from our members about further building upgrades that would make your workout experience more enjoyable. To put forward your ideas, please talk to Site Manager Dwayne Bailey directly or e-mail him at dbailey@reimeltgym.com.

questions.question: What is the notice mainly about?

choices.A: The expansion of a parking lot
choices.B: A revision to a parking policy

questions.explanation: Thông báo chủ yếu về việc sửa chữa bãi đỗ xe: "work crews who will be repaving sections of the lot and sealing minor cracks" — lát lại và trám vết nứt = sửa chữa.

questions.question: What is suggested about Reimelt Gym employees?

choices.A: They will be ready to answer questions about the change.
choices.B: They will share an entrance with members for one week.
choices.C: They will lead fewer classes than usual in September.
choices.D: They will be assigned parking spaces in the gym's lot.

questions.explanation: Trong tuần 1–7/9, hội viên phải dùng cổng nhân viên, tức dùng chung lối vào với nhân viên trong một tuần: "all members will need to use the employee entrance at the west end of the building."

questions.question: According to the notice, why should gym members contact Mr. Bailey?

choices.C: To learn how to receive reimbursement
choices.D: To inquire about the progress of a project

questions.explanation: Hội viên liên hệ ông Bailey để đề xuất cải thiện cơ sở vật chất: "We are always willing to hear from our members about further building upgrades... To put forward your ideas, please talk to Site Manager Dwayne Bailey."

items.title: Products you'll love!
items.text:
To: Theresa Burgess <burgess.t@monticello1.eu>
From: Beranston <info@beranstoncamping.eu>
Date: February 1
Subject: Products you'll love!

Dear Ms. Burgess,

We understand that there is a vast array of options to choose from when selecting camping gear, so we have compiled some product suggestions based on your recent orders. Aldrin is our newest addition to Beranston Camping, and this brand has already become a best-seller. If you purchase any Aldrin products this month, their shipping fee will be waived. Click the link to be taken to our Web site and buy your items in just minutes!

• Aldrin Battery-Operated Lantern [€45]: This lantern is safe to use inside or outside your tent, and one charge can provide up to 350 hours of light on the lowest setting.
• Aldrin Sleeping Bag [€150]: The perfect blend of comfort and practicality, this bag is suitable for temperatures down to −10°C and can be compressed into a size of just 15 x 30 centimeters for easy transport.
• Aldrin Stove [€50]: This stove is lightweight and small, but it fits pots of all sizes to make outdoor cooking easy.

Please note that we now accept returned items for up to 45 days from the purchase date, as feedback from our customers indicated that 30 days was not enough, especially for items given as gifts that may not be opened right away.

Happy shopping!

The Beranston Team

questions.question: Why did Ms. Burgess receive the e-mail?

choices.A: She commented on a social media page.
choices.B: She asked for some product updates.
choices.C: She contacted the customer service department.
choices.D: She previously made purchases on a Web site.

questions.explanation: Bà Burgess nhận email vì trước đó đã mua hàng: "we have compiled some product suggestions based on your recent orders."

questions.question: What is NOT indicated about the Aldrin brand's items?

choices.A: They have become popular with customers.
choices.B: They are offered at a discounted price.
choices.C: They are eligible for free delivery in February.

questions.explanation: Câu NOT: A (best-seller), C (miễn phí ship tháng này), D (bếp Stove) đều được nêu; riêng B (giảm giá bán) KHÔNG có — email chỉ miễn phí vận chuyển "their shipping fee will be waived", không hạ giá sản phẩm.

questions.question: What has Beranston changed about its return policy?

choices.A: The amount of store credit that can be earned
choices.B: The documentation required for returning gifts
choices.C: The cost of mailing back items

questions.explanation: Beranston đổi thời hạn trả hàng: "we now accept returned items for up to 45 days from the purchase date, as feedback... indicated that 30 days was not enough" — kéo dài từ 30 lên 45 ngày.

items.title: Join the Fun at the Fall Festival!
items.text:
Join the Fun at the Fall Festival!
Prairie Park, Saturday, October 20, 9 A.M.–7 P.M.

The Fall Festival is an annual celebration full of fun for all ages. This year, it will take place at Prairie Park on Saturday, October 20. Everyone in town is welcome to attend, and we encourage you to also participate in the festival's many activities. — [1] —.

One way to take part is to show your creativity by making and decorating your own scarecrow. Businesses, schools, and charities can enter this event. The registration fee is $20, and this includes the wooden frame (5' x 8') and a mini bale of straw for stuffing. — [2] —. We ask for one entry per group so that as many people as possible can participate. You may register and pick up your materials at City Hall anytime during regular business hours. Charities will only be charged $10.

Calling all bakers! The festival will include a pie-baking contest. — [3] —. Bring your pie(s) to the booth near the soccer fields at the northern end of the park at 10 A.M. on the day of the festival. Containers will not be returned, so please use a disposal pie tin for your pie. — [4] —. Judging will take place at 2 P.M., with the top three winners receiving a basket of $100 worth of baking accessories. Free pie and ice cream will be served after the winners have been announced. Advanced registration for the baking event is not necessary; however, if you would like to be one of the lucky people critiquing the entries, please call Cassie Shaw at 555-0199. We are looking for a panel of about five people.

A complete list of festival activities can be found on the city's Web site at www.westover.gov.

questions.question: Where would this announcement most likely appear?
questions.explanation: Đây là thông báo sự kiện cộng đồng cả thị trấn, hợp với bản tin địa phương: "Everyone in town is welcome to attend" và "A complete list of festival activities can be found on the city's Web site at www.westover.gov."

questions.question: What benefit for nonprofit organizations is mentioned?

choices.C: An opportunity to win a prize

questions.explanation: Tổ chức phi lợi nhuận (charities) được giảm phí đăng ký: phí thường "$20" nhưng "Charities will only be charged $10."

questions.question: Why should people contact Ms. Shaw?

choices.A: To apply to be a competition judge
choices.C: To arrange to pick up materials
choices.D: To request the full festival schedule

questions.explanation: Liên hệ Ms. Shaw để đăng ký làm giám khảo chấm thi làm bánh: "if you would like to be one of the lucky people critiquing the entries, please call Cassie Shaw" — critiquing entries = chấm/giám khảo.

questions.question:
In which of the positions marked [1], [2], [3], and [4] does the following sentence best belong?
"There are a limited number of spots available."
questions.explanation: Câu "There are a limited number of spots available." hợp vị trí [2]: đứng ngay trước "We ask for one entry per group so that as many people as possible can participate" — số suất có hạn nên mỗi nhóm chỉ một suất, logic nối liền mạch phần đăng ký làm bù nhìn.

items.text:
Virginia Lietz [1:18 P.M.]
OK, I rang Mr. McFarlin right after our morning staff meeting to see whether he wanted to go forward with contract negotiations.

Jude Doyle [1:19 P.M.]
How did it go?

Virginia Lietz [1:19 P.M.]
Well, he decided to hire Rooker Computing instead since it has the lowest prices in the industry.

Megan Howell [1:20 P.M.]
We spent days on that sales pitch!

Virginia Lietz [1:21 P.M.]
I know. Everyone worked so hard. It's a big letdown.

Jude Doyle [1:21 P.M.]
To be honest, I'm not surprised that Mr. McFarlin preferred a well-established business like Rooker over a start-up. They have nearly five times the number of employees we do. But they also have more clients. I don't think they're able to provide the focused, personal service that we offer.

Megan Howell [1:22 P.M.]
You have a point. Most customers eventually figure out that it's worth the slightly higher cost to have a dependable tech support team like ours.

Virginia Lietz [1:23 P.M.]
Mr. McFarlin informed me that they signed a one-year contract. Therefore, we'll have another opportunity to secure a contract next year during the renewal period.

Megan Howell [1:26 P.M.]
I guess we need to put this defeat behind us and focus on preparing the presentation for Stalford Industries.

Jude Doyle [1:27 P.M.]
Exactly. And instead of making a completely new one, we can just adapt the one we have to address Stalford's specific needs.

questions.question: What did Ms. Lietz do in the morning?
questions.explanation: Bà Lietz viết: "I rang Mr. McFarlin right after our morning staff meeting" — "rang" nghĩa là gọi điện thoại. Buổi sáng bà đã gọi điện.

questions.question: At 1:20 P.M., what does Ms. Howell most likely mean when she writes, "We spent days on that sales pitch"?

choices.A: She is surprised that a meeting ended quickly.
choices.B: She is frustrated that an appointment was postponed.
choices.C: She is disappointed with an employment decision.
choices.D: She is confident that negotiations will go well.

questions.explanation: Trước đó bà Lietz báo McFarlin "decided to hire Rooker Computing instead". Câu "We spent days on that sales pitch!" thể hiện sự thất vọng vì công sức bỏ ra bị lãng phí do quyết định chọn nhà cung cấp (employment decision) của khách hàng.

questions.question: What is NOT indicated about Rooker Computing?

choices.A: It has more staff than the writers' company.
choices.B: It is known for providing good customer service.
choices.C: Its prices are lower than those of its competitors.
choices.D: It has been in operation longer than the writers' company.

questions.explanation: A đúng ("nearly five times the number of employees we do"), C đúng ("the lowest prices in the industry"), D đúng ("a well-established business like Rooker over a start-up"). Riêng B thì ngược lại: Doyle nói "I don't think they're able to provide the focused, personal service that we offer" — Rooker KHÔNG nổi tiếng về dịch vụ khách hàng tốt. Vậy B là điều KHÔNG được nêu.

questions.question: What does Mr. Doyle suggest doing?
questions.explanation: Ông Doyle đề nghị: "instead of making a completely new one, we can just adapt the one we have to address Stalford's specific needs" — điều chỉnh bài thuyết trình sẵn có thay vì làm mới.

items.text:
Carlsbrook Children's Hospital
1077 Gwent Road
Arlington, VA 20330

June 15

Dr. Katherine James
896 Cardiff Street
Arlington, VA 22210

Dear Dr. James,

Please accept this letter of appreciation for all the work your charity has done to contribute to the success of our new annex for children with special conditions. We could not have done it without your support. It was also wonderful to finally meet you in person at the opening ceremony last week. — [1] —.

As promised, I am sending you the research on creating a nurturing environment for children with progressive conditions. The first enclosure is a study from Wichita University led by Dr. Steven Chapman that describes the effects of color and music on recuperation periods. Although this trial was done with adults, we believe the effects would be similar for younger groups as well. That means the choice of paint in patients' rooms should be taken into consideration. — [2] —. The second enclosure is a joint study between our hospital and the local technical college. Run by Dr. Adele Diop, this research shows a strong link between providing specialized facilities and medical outcomes. — [3] —.

These studies should be useful to you when you help Arlington Hospital write their grant application for upgrading their facilities for children next month. Let me also congratulate you on this, your first consultancy work. — [4] —. I am sure that a number of my counterparts at other hospitals around the country would benefit from your help on similar projects, so please let me know if you are interested in doing more of this grant application assistance work.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ursula Augustin
Head of Pediatrics, Carlsbrook Children's Hospital
Enclosures

questions.question: Where does Dr. James work?
questions.explanation: Thư cảm ơn Dr. James: "all the work your charity has done" — bà làm việc ở một tổ chức từ thiện (charity).

questions.question: What did Dr. Augustin agree to do?

choices.C: Carry out a medical treatment trial
choices.D: Forward the results of some studies

questions.explanation: Dr. Augustin viết "As promised, I am sending you the research..." và mô tả "The first enclosure is a study...", "The second enclosure is a joint study..." — bà đã hứa và đang chuyển kết quả các nghiên cứu (forward the results of some studies).

questions.question: What is indicated about Dr. James?

choices.B: She will be changing employers next month.
choices.C: She will be involved in obtaining some financing.
choices.D: She is responsible for conducting some medical research.

questions.explanation: Thư nêu: "when you help Arlington Hospital write their grant application for upgrading their facilities" — Dr. James sẽ tham gia giúp xin tài trợ (obtaining financing). (A sai vì đây là "your first consultancy work".)

questions.question:
In which of the positions marked [1], [2], [3], and [4] does the following sentence best belong?
"It is amazing that this had not happened yet, considering that you and I have been working on many of the same projects."
questions.explanation: Câu chèn nói việc "this had not happened yet" dù hai người đã cùng làm nhiều dự án — "this" chỉ việc gặp mặt trực tiếp. Nó nối tiếp câu ở vị trí [1]: "It was also wonderful to finally meet you in person at the opening ceremony last week. — [1] —." Vậy chọn [1].

items.text:
E-mail
To: Raymond Mora <rmora@berringley.gov>
From: Kim Denson <kdenson@berringley.gov>
Date: May 8
Subject: Berringley Community Picnic

Dear Raymond,

Thanks for booking the bands for the upcoming community picnic. I think it will make a big difference to the atmosphere of the venue. We'll use the new gazebo as a stage if possible. It's supposed to be completed by May 15, two weeks before the picnic. However, Colbritt Construction, who was hired to do the work, is behind schedule, so it might not be ready in time. If that happens, we can rent a temporary stage from Romanto Supplies, and their crew will set it up and take it down after the event. Also, we're expecting a lot of people to turn up to the event, so I'm worried that we'll quickly run out of space for vehicles. Therefore, I'd like you to post a message on the city's Web site reminding people that taking public transportation is recommended.

Thanks!

Kim

──────────

Letter
Vera Fleming
214 Blackwell Street
Berringley, VT

Dear Ms. Fleming,

On behalf of the Berringley Event Planning Committee, I would like to cordially invite you to the 14th Annual Berringley Community Picnic on May 30. You may bring your own food or make a purchase from one of the booths sponsored by a local restaurant. I would be happy to reserve a seat for you and up to three guests in the VIP section designated for city council members. You would have a perfect view of the temporary stage, which will be set up at the northern end of Turner Park. If you would like to attend, please send back the enclosed postcard by May 27.

We hope to see you there!

Kim Denson

questions.question: What has Mr. Mora done?
questions.explanation: E-mail gửi cho Raymond Mora mở đầu: "Thanks for booking the bands for the upcoming community picnic" — ông Mora đã đặt/sắp xếp ban nhạc, tức chương trình giải trí trực tiếp (live entertainment). (C sai vì ông đặt chứ không phải "gợi ý".)

questions.question: What is Ms. Denson concerned about?
questions.explanation: Trong e-mail, bà Denson viết: "we're expecting a lot of people... so I'm worried that we'll quickly run out of space for vehicles" — lo thiếu chỗ đậu xe (parking spaces).

questions.question: Who most likely is Ms. Fleming?
questions.explanation: Thư gửi bà Fleming: "reserve a seat for you and up to three guests in the VIP section designated for city council members" — bà là thành viên hội đồng thành phố, tức một chính trị gia địa phương (city politician).

questions.question: What is implied about Colbritt Construction?

choices.A: It proposed safety features for a gazebo.
choices.B: Its office is located near Turner Park.
choices.C: It regularly does work for the city.
choices.D: It failed to finish a project on time.

questions.explanation: GHÉP hai văn bản: E-mail nói gazebo do "Colbritt Construction... is behind schedule, so it might not be ready in time", nếu vậy phải thuê sân khấu tạm. Thư (viết sau) xác nhận "a perfect view of the temporary stage, which will be set up" — sân khấu tạm được dùng, chứng tỏ Colbritt đã KHÔNG hoàn thành dự án đúng hạn (failed to finish on time).

questions.question: Why should Ms. Fleming send back the postcard?

choices.B: To give feedback about a concert
choices.C: To show interest in renting a booth
choices.D: To cast a vote on a community issue

questions.explanation: Thư viết: "I would be happy to reserve a seat for you and up to three guests in the VIP section... If you would like to attend, please send back the enclosed postcard" — gửi bưu thiếp để đăng ký/nhận chỗ ngồi VIP đặc biệt (request special seats).

items.text:
Advertisement
Custom-made curtains now available at Anfield Furnishings!

Anfield Furnishings is pleased to introduce Bryker, our new line of custom-made curtains. We understand that each home is different, and our standard lines of curtains and drapes may not suit your home exactly. That's why we are offering this new service. In addition to being customized to the exact specifications of your window, Bryker curtains also come with a thick insulated layer to keep heat in, meaning you'll pay less for energy to heat your home in the winter. These stylish and high-quality curtains are available in several colors and over 250 patterns.

Book an appointment with us and we will have an employee visit your home or office to take precise measurements. The session will last for approximately half an hour, and we can begin producing your curtains within just a few days—no express service needed! Customers must put down a $25 deposit when booking the appointment, but these funds can be used toward your purchase.

To find out more, call 1-800-555-0176, or visit www.anfieldfurn.com. Please note that for most Anfield Furnishing products, we accept returns within two months of the purchase date, but this does not apply to the Bryker line.

──────────

Form
Anfield Furnishings
Confirmation of Appointment for Taking Measurements

Customer: Pamela Alessi
Phone number: 555-0133
Address: 6795 Townes Lane, Austin, TX 78730
E-mail address: allessip@balconeco.com
Appointment Date/Time: October 8, 1:30 P.M.
Property type: Residential

Notes: To expedite the data-collection process, please leave a minimum of two feet of space between the windows and any sofas, tables, etc. so that the technician has easy access to them.

questions.question: What is mentioned about Bryker curtains?

choices.A: They are the company's top-selling item.

questions.explanation: Quảng cáo: "Bryker curtains also come with a thick insulated layer to keep heat in, meaning you'll pay less for energy to heat your home in the winter" — giảm hóa đơn năng lượng (reduce energy bills). (D sai: "several colors and over 250 patterns" — 250 là hoa văn, không phải màu.)

questions.question: What is implied about Anfield Furnishings?

choices.A: It does not allow returns of customized products.
choices.B: Its Web site has discussion forums for customers.
choices.C: It has made an agreement with a new supplier.
choices.D: Its showroom is restocked every two months.

questions.explanation: Quảng cáo: "we accept returns within two months... but this does not apply to the Bryker line." Bryker là dòng may theo yêu cầu (custom-made), nên hàm ý công ty KHÔNG nhận trả lại sản phẩm làm riêng theo yêu cầu (customized products).

questions.question: What is suggested about Ms. Alessi?

choices.A: Her appointment was booked by phone.
choices.B: She has made an initial payment.
choices.C: A consultation will take place at her business.
choices.D: She will choose an express option.

questions.explanation: GHÉP hai văn bản: Quảng cáo yêu cầu "Customers must put down a $25 deposit when booking the appointment"; Form là "Confirmation of Appointment" đã đặt lịch cho bà Alessi. Suy ra bà đã đặt cọc, tức đã thanh toán ban đầu (made an initial payment). (C sai: Form ghi "Property type: Residential" — tại nhà, không phải nơi làm việc.)

questions.question: When most likely will Ms. Alessi's appointment end on October 8?
questions.explanation: GHÉP hai văn bản: Form ghi "Appointment Date/Time: October 8, 1:30 P.M."; Quảng cáo nói "The session will last for approximately half an hour." 1:30 P.M. + 30 phút = 2:00 P.M.

questions.question: What should Ms. Alessi do prior to the appointment?
questions.explanation: Phần Notes của Form: "please leave a minimum of two feet of space between the windows and any sofas, tables, etc. so that the technician has easy access" — dọn trống khu vực gần cửa sổ (clear areas near the windows). (A sai: chỉ chừa khoảng trống, không phải dời hết đồ khỏi phòng.)

items.text:
Notice
NOTICE

Attention, Colba Footwear shoppers:

The Namara Building branch of Colba Footwear will hold its final day of business on Sunday, April 30. Although we enjoy providing casual and formal footwear for our Edendale customers, we could not avoid this closure because the owner of our building plans to sell the structure for the sake of the upcoming stadium project. Merchandise will be discounted in the week leading up to the closure (Namara Building branch only). Thank you for your many years of patronage at this branch, and we look forward to continuing to serve you at the Tennyson Mall branch, where business will carry on as usual.

—Gaurav Kaul
Owner, Colba Footwear

──────────

Online Review
https://www.mylocalshopreviews.com/bellcity

Bell City >> Retail >> Shoes >> Colba Footwear

Colba Footwear has an impressive range of goods, and I believe it is the best place in the city to buy shoes. Its attentive salespeople genuinely listen to your needs and make recommendations tailored to your specific situation. The business is now down to just one branch, since its original store closed a few weeks ago, but the second branch provides the same level of service, despite being open for a much shorter amount of time.

Posted May 18 by R.P.

──────────

Article
Bell City Stadium Project Moves Forward

BELL CITY, May 30—The construction of a stadium in the Edendale neighborhood is moving forward, as all permits have been approved and the land acquisition deals have been finalized. Willins Development, the company overseeing the project, has purchased a number of buildings in the area, all of which will be demolished in order to make room for the 50,000-seat stadium designed by architect Anja Lindelauf.

The stadium, which will be named once city officials sell its naming rights to generate further income for the project, will be owned by the city and will be used not just for sports, but also concerts, festivals, and more, making it a welcome addition to the community. It will feature a retractable roof so that it can be used year-round regardless of the weather conditions. "I'm pleased not only with the functionality of this building but also its appearance," said Ms. Lindelauf. "It will blend in with the buildings and environment around it so as not to take away from the already stunning skyline of Bell City."

questions.question: What is true about the Namara Building?

choices.B: It is next to Tennyson Mall.
choices.C: It has been sold by Mr. Kaul.

questions.explanation: Ghép Notice + Article. Notice nói tòa Namara sẽ bị chủ tòa bán 'for the sake of the upcoming stadium project'; Article cho biết các tòa mua cho dự án sân vận động 'all of which will be demolished'. Vậy tòa Namara sẽ bị phá dỡ (torn down). Loại C vì người bán tòa là chủ tòa nhà, còn Mr. Kaul chỉ là chủ tiệm giày.

questions.question: What is indicated about Colba Footwear?

choices.A: It is the oldest shoe store in Bell City.
choices.B: Some of its sales are made online.
choices.D: Its first store was in Edendale.

questions.explanation: Ghép Notice + Online Review. Notice: chi nhánh Namara phục vụ 'our Edendale customers' và là nơi đang đóng cửa; Review: 'its original store closed a few weeks ago' — cửa hàng gốc (đầu tiên) chính là chi nhánh vừa đóng. Suy ra cửa hàng đầu tiên nằm ở Edendale → đáp án D.

questions.question: In the online review, the word "impressive" in paragraph 1, line 1, is closest in meaning to
questions.explanation: 'Colba Footwear has an impressive range of goods' — 'impressive' ở đây bổ nghĩa cho 'range of goods' nghĩa là dải hàng hóa rộng/phong phú, đồng nghĩa 'extensive' (rộng lớn). Chọn D.

questions.question: What is mentioned about the stadium?

choices.A: It will replace a conference complex.
choices.B: It is intended to be used for various events.
choices.C: It will be named by the city's voters.
choices.D: Its construction was delayed by weather conditions.

questions.explanation: Article: sân vận động 'will be used not just for sports, but also concerts, festivals, and more' — dùng cho nhiều loại sự kiện khác nhau. Đáp án B (various events).

questions.question: What is Ms. Lindelauf pleased about?
questions.explanation: Article trích lời Ms. Lindelauf: 'It will blend in with the buildings and environment around it so as not to take away from the already stunning skyline' — hài hòa với các công trình xung quanh, tức 'complementing nearby structures'. Chọn C.

items.text:
Advertisement
Take a journey back in time with a visit to Aberporth Castle!

Aberporth Castle is a majestic stone structure built in the late thirteenth century as a military outpost. Guided tours of the castle itself and its meticulously manicured gardens are offered daily, with two guides assigned to groups exceeding 20 people to facilitate answering questions.

Other activities available daily include the following:
- Sampling examples of medieval cuisine at a traditional lunch hosted by Fritz Pinard
- Watching a pottery-making demonstration by Sophie Johnston
- Attending a lecture from the site's master gardener, Marilyn Clayton
- Horseback-riding through the surrounding woodlands with Aja Devi*
- Participating in a sword-fighting lesson given by Joseph Manzo*

Please note that starred activities (*) require pre-registration.

Find out more at www.aberporthcastle.com.

──────────

E-mail
E-Mail message

To: All Tour Guides
From: Thomas Whitby <t.whitby@aberporthcastle.com>
Date: April 18
Subject: Updated schedule for tomorrow

Hello everyone,

We have a hectic week ahead of us, so I appreciate your cooperative spirit in taking on more work than usual. Remember that when you're showing people around the castle and grounds, they should be reminded about the on-site activities as well as the gift shop merchandise. I've posted the updated schedule for this week in the office. Alyssa will join Riley in handling the Willaun Institute group. In addition, Alexandra will help Montgomery University with a group photo at the main gate at 1 P.M., so please avoid the area during that time.

Thank you!

Thomas Whitby

──────────

E-mail
*E-Mail*

To: Aberporth Customer Service <service@aberporthcastle.com>
From: Bethany Hayward <b.hayward@willauninstitute.com>
Date: April 24
Subject: My visit

To Whom It May Concern:

I visited Aberporth Castle on April 19 with a group of students from the Willaun Institute, and I wanted to share my impressions of your site. I thought this was a valuable educational experience for everyone, and many students showed renewed interest in the medieval time period afterwards. We had the opportunity to participate in all of the on-site activities with the exception of one, due to time limitations. I personally found the demonstration on creating clay bowls to be fascinating, making it the one I enjoyed most. I hope to make a trip to Aberporth Castle an annual occurrence for our school, and I would encourage my friends and colleagues to visit the site in their spare time as well. Thank you for a wonderful and unforgettable time.

Sincerely,

Bethany Hayward

questions.question: According to the advertisement, what must visitors do to take a sword-fighting lesson?
questions.explanation: Advertisement: lớp đấu kiếm 'sword-fighting lesson given by Joseph Manzo*' có dấu sao, và 'starred activities (*) require pre-registration' — phải đăng ký trước. Đáp án C (Register in advance).

questions.question: What is implied about Aberporth Castle?

choices.A: Its main gate is being remodeled.
choices.C: It is always busy in April.

questions.explanation: E-mail 1 (Whitby): nhắc hướng dẫn viên nhắc khách về 'the gift shop merchandise' — có cửa hàng quà lưu niệm, tức một điểm bán lẻ (retail establishment). Chọn B.

questions.question: What does Mr. Whitby imply about the group from the Willaun Institute?

choices.A: Some of its members are under 13 years of age.
choices.B: Its members will pose for a photograph.
choices.C: It will arrive too late for a special meal.
choices.D: There will be more than 20 people in it.

questions.explanation: Ghép Advertisement + E-mail 1. Ad: 'two guides assigned to groups exceeding 20 people'; E-mail 1: 'Alyssa will join Riley in handling the Willaun Institute group' — có hai hướng dẫn viên phục vụ nhóm Willaun, suy ra nhóm đông hơn 20 người. Đáp án D.

questions.question: In the second e-mail, the word "share" in paragraph 1, line 2, is closest in meaning to
questions.explanation: E-mail 2: 'I wanted to share my impressions of your site' — 'share' ở đây nghĩa là bày tỏ/nói ra cảm nhận, đồng nghĩa 'express'. Chọn A.

questions.question: Who led the activity that Ms. Hayward enjoyed most?
questions.explanation: Ghép E-mail 2 + Advertisement. Hayward thích nhất 'the demonstration on creating clay bowls' = màn làm gốm; Ad ghi 'pottery-making demonstration by Sophie Johnston'. Người dẫn hoạt động là Ms. Johnston. Đáp án B.

items.text:
Instructions
Pensler House Runway Competition

Congratulations! Your design has been accepted for our amateur fashion show. This means that our preliminary judging panel was intrigued by the drawings you submitted and would like to see the finished outfit come down the runway. You now have a chance to become one of the ten winners that will be selected on the event day.

The finished entries must arrive at our headquarters (Galtway Building) by 5 P.M. on March 1 so that they can be photographed in the week prior to the runway show. To ensure that the clothing doesn't get lost, it must be brought by you; do not send it through the mail.

You should also e-mail a short description of yourself and your entry to mjensen@penslerhouse.com. If you plan to supply your own model, please complete the attached Contact Information Card for that person and send it back to us. Otherwise, we will supply a model for you.

──────────

E-mail
E-Mail message

To: Yolanda Sanchez <yosanchez@ma103.com>
From: Malcolm Jensen <mjensen@penslerhouse.com>
Date: March 3
Subject: Pensler House Runway Competition

Dear Ms. Sanchez,

Regarding the upcoming runway show on March 7, we have received your Contact Information Card, but we are still waiting for the short description of your work and design history. It should be between 80 and 100 words. Please e-mail it to me as soon as possible.

All designers should visit the Pensler House headquarters the day before the event at 5 P.M. in order to try the clothes on the models and make the necessary adjustments. One of our in-house designers, Genevieve Massey, will make recommendations about getting the most flattering fit. On the event day, everyone should report to the Wylona Center at 3 P.M. to leave plenty of time to prepare the models' hair and makeup.

If you have any further questions, please feel free to e-mail me anytime.

Malcolm Jensen

──────────

Forum Post
www.penslerhouse.com/events/runwaycompetition/forum

Posted: March 8   Post written by: Gemma Byrum

I had a great time at the Pensler House Runway Competition at the Wylona Center yesterday. There were so many unique designs on the runway that it was remarkable that the work was done by amateurs. If you didn't get the chance to catch the show, stop by the lobby of the Almeta Building to see the best outfit made by each of the winners. The host of the runway show announced that they would be on display there for the rest of the month. Don't pass up this opportunity to see some amazing fashions!

questions.question: What do the instructions indicate that designers are required to do?
questions.explanation: Instructions: bài dự thi hoàn thiện 'must be brought by you; do not send it through the mail' — người dự thi phải tự mang đến (deliver in person), không gửi bưu điện. Chọn C.

questions.question: What is suggested about Ms. Sanchez?

choices.A: She e-mailed some questions to Mr. Jensen.
choices.C: Her drawings were seen by Ms. Massey.
choices.D: She recruited a model for the runway show.

questions.explanation: Ghép Instructions + E-mail. Instructions: chỉ khi 'you plan to supply your own model' mới 'complete the attached Contact Information Card'; E-mail (Jensen): 'we have received your Contact Information Card'. Vậy Ms. Sanchez tự tìm/cung cấp người mẫu. Đáp án D.

questions.question: According to Mr. Jensen, what will happen on March 6?

choices.B: A tour of a design studio

questions.explanation: E-mail: sự kiện diễn ra 'runway show on March 7', và 'All designers should visit... the day before the event at 5 P.M. in order to try the clothes on the models and make the necessary adjustments'. Ngày trước 7/3 là 6/3 → buổi thử đồ (fitting session). Chọn A.

questions.question: What is implied about the Almeta Building?

choices.A: It is the headquarters of Pensler House.
choices.B: It will display ten outfits in March.
choices.D: It was the site of the runway show.

questions.explanation: Ghép Instructions + Forum Post. Instructions: sẽ chọn 'ten winners'; Forum: trưng bày ở Almeta Building 'the best outfit made by each of the winners' suốt phần còn lại của tháng (tháng Ba). Mỗi người thắng một bộ → 10 bộ trưng bày trong tháng Ba. Đáp án B. Loại D vì show diễn ra ở Wylona Center.

questions.question: In the forum post, the phrase "pass up" in paragraph 1, line 6, is closest in meaning to
questions.explanation: Forum Post: 'Don't pass up this opportunity to see some amazing fashions!' — 'pass up' ở đây nghĩa là bỏ lỡ, đồng nghĩa 'miss'. Chọn B.
